tools.name: phpstan_analyze
tools.description: PHPStan static analysis. Returns type errors as JSON.

tools.name: ecs_check
tools.description: ECS code style dry-run. Only previews violations without fixing. Prefer ecs_fix unless you need a read-only preview.

tools.name: ecs_fix
tools.description: ECS code style fix. Detects and fixes violations in one step. Preferred over ecs_check — shows what was wrong AND fixes it.

tools.name: phpunit_run
tools.description: PHPUnit test runner. Returns test results.

testsuite.description: Test suite to run. Falls back to .lintrc.local.json phpunit.testsuite if not provided.

paths.description: Test file(s) or directories (overrides testsuite). Examples: single file, multiple files, directory, or mixed.

filter.description: Filter by test/class name or regex pattern (e.g., testAddProduct, CartServiceTest, testAdd.*)

config.description: PHPUnit config file path. Falls back to .lintrc.local.json phpunit.config if not provided.

coverage_format.description: Coverage output format. Use 'clover' to identify which specific lines are not covered (machine-readable XML with per-line hit counts). Use 'html' for a visual line-by-line report. Use 'text' for aggregate percentages only (does not identify uncovered lines). All file-based formats (clover, cobertura, html) also emit a text summary to the console. Default: 'text'.

coverage_path.description: Output path for the coverage report file or directory. Defaults: clover/cobertura → 'coverage.xml', html → 'coverage/'. Not applicable for 'text' format.

output_format.description: Test output format. 'testdox' shows human-readable test descriptions.

tools.name: phpunit_coverage_gaps
tools.description: Discover uncovered lines and methods from a Clover XML coverage report. Shows per-file coverage percentage, uncovered method names, and uncovered line ranges grouped by file (worst coverage first). Paths are relative to the project root. Two-step workflow: first run phpunit_run with coverage=true and coverage_format="clover" to generate the XML, then run this tool to analyze gaps.

clover_path.description: Path to the Clover XML file generated by phpunit_run with coverage_format="clover". Default: 'coverage.xml'.

source_filter.description: Only report files whose absolute path contains this substring. Use to scope results to a specific module or namespace and filter out framework base classes that leak into coverage (e.g., 'src/Core/Content/', 'ContentSystem').

tools.name: console_run
tools.description: Symfony console command runner. Executes bin/console commands with arguments and options.

arguments.description: Positional arguments for the command (e.g., ['PluginName'] for plugin:install)

options.description: Command options as key-value pairs. Boolean true = --flag, string = --key=value, array = multiple --key=value

no_interaction.description: Do not ask any interactive question (--no-interaction)

tools.name: console_list
tools.description: List available Symfony console commands. Returns concise LLM-optimized output by default. Optionally filter by namespace prefix.

format.description: Prefer 'llm' (default) - concise grouped output. Other formats are passed to Symfony as output format.

tools.name: rector_fix
tools.description: Rector refactoring. Detects and applies code transformations in one step. Preferred over rector_check — shows diffs AND applies them.

paths.description: File paths or directories to process. When omitted, uses paths from rector.php config.

output_format.description: Output format. JSON (default) returns structured diffs and applied rule names.

config.description: Rector config file path. Falls back to .mcp-php-tooling.json rector.config if not provided.

only.description: Filter to a single Rector rule by FQCN or short name (e.g. 'CountArrayToEmptyArrayComparisonRector').

only_suffix.description: Filter files by name suffix (e.g. 'Controller' matches *Controller.php).

tools.name: rector_check
tools.description: Rector refactoring dry-run. Only previews changes without applying. Prefer rector_fix unless you need a read-only preview.

paths.description: File paths or directories to process. When omitted, uses paths from rector.php config.

output_format.description: Output format. JSON (default) returns structured diffs and applied rule names.

config.description: Rector config file path. Falls back to .mcp-php-tooling.json rector.config if not provided.

only.description: Filter to a single Rector rule by FQCN or short name (e.g. 'CountArrayToEmptyArrayComparisonRector').

only_suffix.description: Filter files by name suffix (e.g. 'Controller' matches *Controller.php).
